title: Better Endermite
description: Let Endermites have better texture with emissive eyes.
body:
**Better Endermite – Resource Pack**

This resource pack gives the Endermite a fresh new look — featuring a smoother, more detailed texture with purple ribs, a lighter magenta tail, and emissive glowing eyes that shine in the dark, adding to the End's eerie beauty.

**Requires [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) or OptiFine to enable emissive eyes.**

Please join my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/XRuZTuFFHR) if you have suggestions what **_You_** want or found any Issues.
